name: signalbase-final-mvp
description: Busca de leads B2B por UF, cidade e CNAEs, com base local da Receita, enriquecimento LinkedIn, decisores, score e evidencias.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n worker,api,web -c auto "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/web run build && npm --prefix apps/api run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix services/linkedin-worker run test && npm --prefix apps/api run test && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.preview:static: npm run build && npm --prefix apps/api run start
